title: Class Gem: Core
description: This is a core for a series of mods with RPG mechanics, on its own it does nothing.
body:
This mod serves as a shared core for a collection of RPG mods based on class gems.

It provides interfaces, events, helpers, and common logic for passive activations, cooldowns, ally detection, and more.

It does not offer any direct gameplay functionality. A complementary mod (such as Paladin Gem) is required for it to have in-game effect.



Este mod funciona como núcleo compartido para una colección de mods RPG basados en gemas de clase.

Proporciona interfaces, eventos, utilidades y lógica común para activaciones pasivas, tiempos de recarga, detección de aliados y más.

No ofrece funcionalidad directa para el jugador. Se requiere un mod complementario (como Paladin Gem) para que tenga efecto dentro del juego.
